contactData.title: Contact us
contactData.subtitle: Our team is here to help you navigate your health journey. Reach out through any of our channels.

info.title: Office
info.content: Addis Ababa, 6 kilo, ILI Building, Office 511

cta.title: Expert Medical Care is a Call Away
cta.text: Talk to our specialized clinical team in Amharic or English at any time.

terms.title: Privacy & Data Protection
terms.content: We strictly adhere to the Ethiopian Data Protection Proclamation. All video calls and chats are end-to-end encrypted. We do not sell or share medical records with third-party advertisers.

terms.title: Emergency Notice
terms.content: Tenachin is for elective and non-emergency consultations. For life-threatening emergencies, please dial 907 (Red Cross) or visit the nearest ER immediately.

terms.title: Licensed Professionals
terms.content: Every provider on our platform is a verified healthcare professional licensed by the Ethiopian Ministry of Health (MoH) and the relevant regulatory bodies.

terms.title: Medical Advice Disclaimer
terms.content: Telehealth is a tool to augment care, not replace physical examination when required. Our doctors may recommend an in-person visit if your condition cannot be safely managed digitally.

terms.title: Prescription Policy
terms.content: Prescriptions are issued at the sole discretion of the attending physician. We do not prescribe controlled substances or narcotics via telehealth.

terms.title: Consent to Telehealth
terms.content: By using Tenachin, you acknowledge the limitations of remote diagnosis and consent to receiving care via electronic communication.
